LanguageData.PM_Faction_Sweeper.label: Sweeper union
LanguageData.PM_Faction_Sweeper.description: Sweepers of the City who have exiled themselves this far. Cleaners of the Backstreets, they salvage everything lying around to destroy or reuse it. They speak a language of their own, incomprehensible to non-Sweepers — and vice versa. Without a translation lexicon, no exchange with them is possible.
